options.name: NJ Transit / PATH Rail
options.recommendation: Best option for fans from NYC. Direct service to stadium.
tips: Buy ticket in advance via app
Board at Penn Station lower level
Follow FIFA signage at Meadowlands station

options.name: FIFA Shuttle Bus
options.recommendation: Good for groups. Air-conditioned. Drop-off at main gate.
tips: Runs until 2 hours after final whistle

options.name: Uber / Lyft
options.recommendation: Convenient but expensive. Surge pricing expected near kickoff.
tips: Use rideshare zone – not main entrance
Return pickup will be 1hr wait post-match

options.name: Stadium Parking Lots
options.recommendation: Arrive 3+ hours early. Lot P3 has most availability. Carpool encouraged.
tips: Follow LED signs for open lots
Exit via Route 3 West to avoid congestion

options.name: Walk from Transit Hub
options.recommendation: Greenest option. 7-minute walk from train station on dedicated fan walkway.
tips: Follow the FIFA fan pathway signs
Accessible route available (8 min via ramp)
Great views of the stadium approach

sustainabilityTips: 🚇 Taking the metro saves ~5.4kg CO₂ vs driving alone
🌱 The FIFA shuttle is powered by low-emission vehicles
🚶 Walking from the station? You're our eco-champion!
🚗 Carpooling? Split the carbon – share the journey
♻️ Use refill stations inside the stadium – plastic-free matchday
